CustomField.formula: IF( AND(ISPICKVAL(VATPercent__c,"0%"), InvoiceReceiver__r.RecordType.Id !="012b0000000cLvh", BillingAddressCountry__c = "SWITZERLAND"),"400", IF( AND(ISPICKVAL(VATPercent__c,"0%"), InvoiceReceiver__r.RecordType.Id !="012b0000000cLvh", BillingAddressCountry__c != "SWITZERLAND"),"401", IF( AND(ISPICKVAL(VATPercent__c,"0%"), InvoiceReceiver__r.RecordType.Id ="012b0000000cLvh"),"410", IF( OR(ISPICKVAL(VATPercent__c,"7.7%"), ISPICKVAL(VATPercent__c,"8.1%"),ISPICKVAL(VATPercent__c,"8%")), "311", IF( OR(ISPICKVAL(VATPercent__c,"2.5%"), ISPICKVAL(VATPercent__c,"2.6%")),"312", IF( ISPICKVAL(VATPercent__c,"19%"),"315", ""))))))
CustomField.label: AbacusVATPercent
